title: Epigram Added By Stella[1]
content:
When Margery chastises Ned,
    She calls it combing of his head;
    A kinder wife was never born:
    She combs his head, and finds him horn.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jonathan Swift, titled "Epigram Added By Stella[1]", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
